PerkWorth ← Home

Delete Your Account & Data

Operator: (Legal Entity Name Pending) · Contact: support@perkworth.com · Last updated: February 2026

You are in full control of your data. This page tells you exactly how to delete your PerkWorth account, what gets erased, and what (if anything) we are legally required to retain.

Method 1 — Instant, in-app (recommended)

  1. Open PerkWorth on your phone.
  2. Tap Profile → Settings.
  3. Scroll to the red “Clear All My Data” button at the bottom.
  4. Confirm. Your account, wallet, payments, referrals and family-circle records are deleted from our servers immediately.

This is a one-tap, irreversible action. No email round-trip. You’ll see the confirmation toast the moment your data is gone.

Method 2 — By email (if you uninstalled the app)

If you no longer have the app installed, send a deletion request to support@perkworth.com with the subject line “Account Deletion Request” from the email address you signed up with.

Email support to delete my account →

We will confirm receipt within 2 working days and complete deletion within 7 days. If we cannot verify that you own the account (e.g. the request comes from a different email), we may ask a single verification question before proceeding.

What gets deleted

  • Your account credentials (email, name, phone, bcrypt password hash).
  • Your entire voucher wallet: codes, expiries, brands, screenshots, OCR text.
  • All membership / ROI tracker entries.
  • All Family Circle memberships you created or joined.
  • All referral codes issued or redeemed by you.
  • All in-app support conversations you sent.
  • Notification tokens (push / email) so you stop receiving anything from us.

What we keep — and for how long

We keep the minimum data required by Indian tax and payment-services law:

  • Razorpay payment records (order_id, payment_id, amount, GST invoice) — retained for 7 years as required by the Indian Income Tax Act & RBI payment aggregator rules. These records do not include your name, email or any wallet data — only the anonymised transaction hash.
  • Server access logs — retained for 90 days for security auditing, then automatically purged.

Nothing else is kept. No shadow copies, no analytics profile, no ad graph, no data broker syndication.

Backups

Encrypted MongoDB Atlas backups roll forward on a 30-day retention window. Your deleted account is purged from every backup snapshot within 30 days of the request.

Deleting from Google Play only

Uninstalling the app from your phone does not delete your server-side account — it only removes the app binary. Use Method 1 or Method 2 above to actually erase your data.

Questions?

Write to support@perkworth.com and a human will reply within 2 working days.

Published in accordance with Google Play’s User Data policy and the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 (India). Also aligns with GDPR Article 17 (Right to Erasure) for EU users.
